allow: Bash(python -c "import yfinance as yf; t = yf.Ticker\(''RELIANCE.NS''\); info = t.fast_info; print\(''Currency:'', info.currency if hasattr\(info, ''currency''\) else ''N/A''\); print\(''Last Price:'', info.last_price if hasattr\(info, ''last_price''\) else ''N/A''\); print\(''Exchange:'', info.exchange if hasattr\(info, ''exchange''\) else ''N/A''\)")
